creator: wb.kloke@gmail.com
text:
I have to clarify a point in my bug report. The wrong results in my case
do not come from interp2.

The problem stems indeed from a (in this case my own) 0ct-file returning
real results instead of complex ones, just as in the regression errors
reported in "make check". So the main point in the bug report stands.
-- 
Dipl.-Math. Wilhelm Bernhard Kloke
Kreisstr. 52, 58454 Witten
Tel. 02302 203050
